title: Verify cancellation flow when the incentive offer is disabled via backend
description: Test that if the discount offer is turned off from the backend, the user is not shown the incentive pop-up and proceeds directly to cancellation.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is DISABLED in the backend.

steps.description: 2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The user is NOT shown the incentive offer pop-up. The trial is cancelled immediately, and the feedback pop-up is displayed.
